title: A Grounded Path to Healing in Loudoun County
seo_title: Kaylie Groenhout | EMDR & IFS-Informed Therapist in Leesburg, VA
subtitle: HI, I'M KAYLIE.
bio:
I provide trauma-informed therapy in Leesburg, Virginia for adults who are navigating the heavy, everyday impact of past experiences.

I’m not a nod-and-smile therapist. I bring my real, human self into the room. I believe therapy works best when it's collaborative, curious, and grounded in a genuine relationship. My approach is integrated and evidence-based, focusing on the intersection of your mind, body, and life experiences.

I specialize in working with trauma, anxiety, perfectionism, and relationship struggles. I'm also deeply committed to providing neurodiversity-affirming care and supporting the LGBTQ+ community.

In our sessions, we won't just talk about your problems; we'll work to understand the roots and move toward lasting healing. Whether you're dealing with a specific traumatic event or a lifetime of feeling "not enough," I'm here to support you in finding your way back to yourself.

sections.title: Education & Credentials
items: Master of Education in Clinical Mental Health Counseling - The College of William & Mary
Bachelor of Arts in Communication - Virginia Polytechnic Institute & State University

sections.title: Specialized Training
items: EMDR Therapy (Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing)
Gottman Level 1 Trained for Couples Work
One-year clinical internship at Trauma Specialists of Maryland
